overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through rural medieval countryside. The journey passes a stone tower, farmland with sunflowers, wooden bridges, and forested areas before reaching a coastal viewpoint on an overcast day.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside path approaching stone watchtower

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a winding dirt path toward a stone watchtower, passing it on the right side

entered.detail: tall stone medieval tower with crenellations visible on the hillside
narrow dirt path winding through grassy terrain
rolling green hills with tall grass and scattered bushes
deciduous trees and shrubs lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a white-haired character on horseback riding through open countryside. The camera approaches a historic stone watchtower perched on a grassy hillside under an overcast sky, passing dense vegetation and scattered trees along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmland with wooden fences and crop fields

events.description: video cuts to a different rural location showing farmland with sunflowers and wooden farm buildings

agents.ego_description: riding through cultivated farmland past wooden fences and sunflowers

entered.detail: small rustic wooden hut with thatched or shingled roof
tall yellow sunflowers growing alongside the path
wooden directional sign mounted on a post
small wooden plank bridge crossing a narrow stream

segments.scene_description: Following a cut transition, the scene shifts to a farmland setting with wooden farm buildings and sunflowers lining the dirt path. The character rides past wooden fences and a signpost, approaching a small wooden bridge while crows fly overhead in the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with stone walls and wooden archway

events.description: crossing a small wooden plank bridge over a stream
passing a pedestrian walking along the stone wall

agents.ego_description: riding along a village path, crossing a wooden bridge and passing other travelers near stone walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in simple clothing walking along the stone wall

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the dirt path
wooden structure spanning the path like a gate or support frame

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between stone walls and wooden fences as the character crosses a wooden bridge. The camera passes a pedestrian walking along the wall and approaches a wooden archway structure, with the environment becoming more enclosed by vegetation and man-made barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested path with soldiers standing guard

events.description: encountering soldiers in red armor standing by a tree near the path

agents.ego_description: riding through a forested area with dense pine trees, passing soldiers in red armor standing near a wooden fence

notable_agents.action: group of soldiers in red armor with weapons standing by a tree and wooden fence

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees creating a dense canopy along the path
rough wooden fence made of logs and planks

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a more densely forested area with tall pine trees creating partial cover overhead. The character rides past soldiers in red armor standing guard near a wooden barricade, with the path winding through grassy clearings between the trees.

events.description: path opens up to reveal the sea and coastline in the distance

agents.ego_description: riding along an open coastal path with the ocean visible ahead, passing an abandoned wooden structure

entered.detail: calm sea visible through the mist beyond the grassy dunes
dilapidated wooden hut with broken walls near the coast
weathered wooden fence posts falling over

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a coastal landscape with the sea visible through the mist on the right. The character rides past an abandoned wooden shack and broken fences along the edge of the grassy dunes, with the path leading toward the misty coastline and distant forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rural medieval landscape that shifts from open, wild hillsides into a structured farming community. It begins with a view of a white-haired character on horseback riding through the open countryside toward a historic stone watchtower perched on a grassy hill under an overcast sky. As the path leads away from the tower, the environment opens into farmland where the dirt trail is lined with sunflowers, wooden fences, and farm buildings beneath a misty sky filled with flying crows. The scene then narrows as the rider approaches a small wooden bridge, passing a pedestrian along a stone wall before finally moving through a wooden archway enclosed by dense vegetation and man-made barriers.

The shot follows a continuous journey from the sheltered depths of a dense forest toward the open expanse of a misty coastline. It begins on a winding trail beneath the canopy of tall pine trees, passing soldiers in red armor stationed by a wooden barricade. As the path leads through grassy clearings, the dense woodland gradually thins and the horizon opens up to reveal the sea through a layer of mist. The scene then shifts to a landscape of grassy dunes, where the camera glides past an abandoned wooden shack and broken fences before finally heading toward the distant forest and the hazy edge of the coast.
